# CWE-648: Incorrect Use of Privileged APIs (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-648-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"strconv"
)

// Vulnerable: web handler calls chown with client-supplied uid without privilege checks.
func AssignFileOwner(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	path := r.FormValue("path")
	uidStr := r.FormValue("uid")
	uid, err := strconv.Atoi(uidStr)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "bad request", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	if err := os.Chown(path, uid, -1); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
